title: Automation to filter columns
excerpt: Is there a way to create an automation that will hide or unhinde certain columns?

posts.author: BillBan (Bill Banford)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to create an automation that will hide or unhinde certain columns?

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: There aren’t automations to do that. Whats your use case?

posts.author: BillBan (Bill Banford)
posts.cookedHtml: Basically trying to create a few quick access views. This particular board has a lot of views already, and preferably while in a certain view could select a trigger to hide a number of columns along with some filters that could be “turned on or off”. We are an outdoor living construction company and specifically this relates to a setting a job up, but is only done once at the beginning.

posts.author: MattFrost (Matt Frost)
posts.cookedHtml:
There’s no way to do that at the moment.

If you are saving filtered views, you have the option to hide certain columns in the view. If this is something you recreate a lot, you can then save the board as a template, with those filtered views.
Have you thought about maybe breaking this board up and using either connected boards or the new portfolio manager?
